input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule EV.5.8.3 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: ev.5.8.3
            TITLE: the tsmps must be:

            CONTENT:
            rule EV.5.8.3: The TSMPs must be:
EV.5.8.3 The TSMPs must be: 
a. 4 mm shrouded banana jacks rated to an appropriate voltage level 
b. Color:  Red 
c. Marked “HV+” and “HV-“

final_answer: The TSMPs must be: EV.5.8.3 The TSMPs must be: a. 4 mm shrouded banana jacks rated to an appropriate voltage level b. Color: Red c. Marked “HV+” and “HV-“
